title: The Recording Studio
description: A Suite of Mods designed and integrated for Minecraft Videos.
body:
![Recording Studio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af8e3e51104a53961f3bf81dda469b8b82ce6519.png)
# The Recording Studio
The Recording Studio is a Suite of Useful Recording Mods for Minecraft Fabric

## Features

### Performance
TRS Uses Sodium with Iris and ImmediatelyFast for Beautiful Asthetics whilst Maintaining Stability and Resources for Amazing Video Outputs.

### Animations
TRS Includes Not Enough Animations for Simple Animations in Third Person, Useful for Portraying what action a User is performing from a third person view aswell as Emotecraft for Highly Customizable Player Led Actions that allow for extra details in Recordings.

### Actors
TRS Contains Custom Player Models (CPM) for Highly Customizable Models in your Recordings along side Skin Shuffle for Quickly Changing Skin mid Recording.

### Flashback
TRS Uses [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback), a Modern Recording Mod (Similar to Replay Mod) developed by [@Moulberry](https://modrinth.com/user/Moulberry). It uses a custom UI based around Video Editors such as Adobe Premiere or Davinci Resolve but built into Minecraft itself.

## Content
This is Content Made using the Tools provided in TRS:
Specifically Videos as They Can't (yet) be put into the Modrinth Gallery Section
